runs.name: Replace the incomplete Brand Reference
runs.summary: Completed the bounded source implementation at the existing internal noindex URL and fixed all source-confirmed page defects. Static QA passes; terminal visual quality remains explicitly not passing at 9/15 because rendered comparisons are unavailable and the unchanged shared Switzer-Regular font has a known decode failure.
runs.summaryDa: Gennemførte den afgrænsede kilde-implementering på den eksisterende interne noindex-URL og rettede alle kildebekræftede sidefejl. Statisk QA består; terminal visuel kvalitet består eksplicit IKKE endnu (9/15), fordi renderede sammenligninger mangler og den delte Switzer-Regular-font har en kendt decode-fejl.
runs.lesson: In a separate scoped run, repair or replace the shared Switzer Regular font; when browser access is restored capture 1440/1024/390 renders, verify int.
runs.lessonDa: Reparér eller udskift den delte Switzer Regular-font i en separat afgrænset kørsel; når browseradgang er tilbage, tag 1440/1024/390-renders og verificér.

runs.name: Implementér Frankly Fold som den brugerpla
runs.nameDa: Implementér Frankly Fold som den brugerpla

runs.summaryDa: Frankly Fold er implementeret lokalt som helper-only ikon: fast 48×48 nederst til højre, 72px end-reserve, desktop-tooltip og eksakt fire-path mark; statisk scope-QA er grøn, mens rendered visuel certificering mangler.

runs.name: Audit franklyinsure-main.zip statically fo
runs.summary: Read-only archive audit classified source evidence into adopt now, extract and normalize, reference only, and reject; delivered a contract-first smallest safe extraction set and implementation order.
runs.summaryDa: Read-only arkiv-audit klassificerede kildematerialet i overtag nu, udtræk og normalisér, kun reference, og afvis; leverede et kontrakt-først mindste-sikre udtrækssæt og en implementeringsrækkefølge.
runs.lesson: Approve the contract-first extraction lane: foundations, clean shell, Section, safe rich text, typed Action, Output Contract, then one rendered editor.
runs.lessonDa: Godkend det kontrakt-første udtræksspor: fundamenter, ren shell, Section, sikker rich text, typet Action, Output Contract og til sidst én renderet editor.

runs.name: Nulstil Frankly Instore-hjælperens visuell
runs.summary: Porcelain Lens-reset er færdig lokalt for det visuelle scope: fantasy-canvas, partikler og kontinuerlig RAF er fjernet; den eksakte fire-path Frankly-mark og redaktionelle UI er valideret med før/efter-evidens og lukkede målte P2'er.
runs.summaryDa: Porcelain Lens-reset er færdig lokalt for det visuelle scope: fantasy-canvas, partikler og kontinuerlig RAF er fjernet; den eksakte fire-path Frankly-mark og redaktionelle UI er valideret med før/efter-evidens og lukkede målte P2'er.
gatesDa: Kun visuelt scope; separat AI/model-kørsel er parkeret (0/1)
runs.lesson: Gennemgå Porcelain Lens lokalt; hvis rigtig AI skal prøves, genoptag det separate parkerede AI-run først når dets gates er grønne og brug højst det en.
runs.lessonDa: Gennemgå Porcelain Lens lokalt; hvis rigtig AI skal prøves, genoptag det separate parkerede AI-run først når dets gates er grønne og brug højst det en.

runs.name: Correct the Frankly design-system quality
runs.summary: Re-grounded visual canon in four approved references, reclassified all internal OS/Lab/prototypes as test or anti-reference, and revised the Output Contract, maturity scorecard, architecture, acceptance gate and pilot.
runs.summaryDa: Genforankrede den visuelle kanon i fire godkendte referencer, omklassificerede alle interne OS/Lab/prototyper som test eller anti-reference, og reviderede Output Contract, modenheds-scorecard, arkitektur, acceptance-gate og pilot.
runs.lesson: Build the Ground Truth Registry and run the isolated two-format ground-truth transfer pilot; do not promote any new golden without Jonas.
runs.lessonDa: Byg Ground Truth-registret og kør den isolerede to-formats ground-truth-overførselspilot; promover ingen ny golden uden Jonas.

runs.name: Audit Franklys current design system, expl
runs.summary: Evidence-based audit across 14 outputs and five visual families; recommends a mandatory Frankly Output Contract, composition archetypes, stronger terminal visual QA, and a bounded cockpit web-plus-slide pilot.
runs.summaryDa: Evidensbaseret audit på tværs af 14 outputs og fem visuelle familier; anbefaler en obligatorisk Frankly Output Contract, kompositions-arketyper, stærkere terminal visuel QA og en afgrænset cockpit web-plus-slide-pilot.
runs.lesson: Jonas decides whether to approve the safe-local Frankly Output Contract consolidation spec and isolated cockpit web-plus-slide pilot; fix the pre-exis.
runs.lessonDa: Jonas afgør om den safe-lokale Frankly Output Contract-konsolideringsspec og den isolerede cockpit web-plus-slide-pilot godkendes; ret de forud-eksisterende røde punkter.

runs.name: Consolidate Frankly Lab 4.0 around one can
runs.summary: One canonical 26-item shelf now generates a 20-item public Lab fallback and full local cockpit feed; Registry is local archive only, upload boundary is fail-closed, and scoped terminal/browser QA passed.
runs.summaryDa: Én kanonisk 26-punkts hylde genererer nu et 20-punkts offentligt Lab-fallback og det fulde lokale cockpit-feed; Registry er kun lokalt arkiv, upload-grænsen er fail-closed, og afgrænset terminal/browser-QA bestod.
runs.lesson: Repair the inherited retired-v3 link and legacy Observatory eval baseline in a separate maintenance run; keep deploy and Drive connector writes Jonas-.
runs.lessonDa: Reparér den nedarvede pensioneret-v3-link- og legacy Observatory-eval-baseline i en separat vedligeholdelseskørsel; hold deploy og Drive-connector-skrivninger Jonas-gated.

runs.name: Implementér og afgræns Glas-sfære v1 med e

runs.lessonDa: Kør den forberedte browser-QA på den levende lokale side; promover kun til færdig-lokalt hvis hele desktop/mobil/tilstands/fokus-suiten består.

runs.name: Udvid rosteret med flere agenter (10 under

runs.name: Byg refleksiv hul-finder (foreslår nye age

runs.name: Build and validate a local-only Frankly Cl
runs.summary: Local-only embedded guide helper with typed questions, suggested prompts, source jumps, claims boundaries, accessibility and responsive behavior.
runs.summaryDa: Kun-lokal indlejret guide-hjælper med indtastede spørgsmål, foreslåede prompts, kildehop, claims-grænser, tilgængelighed og responsiv adfærd.
gates: helper is runtime-gated to file an
gatesDa: Hjælperen kører kun på file:// og loopback
runs.lesson: Local review only; keep the helper internal until separate approval is granted for public deploy or real partner activation.
runs.lessonDa: Kun lokal gennemgang; hold hjælperen intern indtil der gives separat godkendelse til offentlig deploy eller reel partner-aktivering.

runs.name: Audit the current Ribbon Lab and define th
runs.summary: Corrected the audit against durable desktop/mobile evidence; clarified that calmCustomGeometry applies to prompt-created, drawn, and polished custom shapes while preset conversion loses 3D through projection, switch-to-custom, and generic reconstruction; Ribbon Lab app files remained untouched. Exact current/post-audit SHA-256: HTML 7eeb214a8d3604c201a5c19d625dc0d7fcc142ababeefb6808742ebe0f3ecf82; CSS f945402968c297a07fce71c928fdced10f1a497207bc3275e1bc04b9d542dc7c; JS 61d7364082933720c86778cdf3807ad608f54359e8f75522bcd00591169d6c18.
runs.summaryDa: Auditten er rettet mod holdbar desktop/mobil-evidens; præciseret at calmCustomGeometry gælder prompt-skabte, tegnede og polerede custom-former, mens preset-konvertering mister 3D gennem projektion, switch-to-custom og generisk rekonstruktion; Ribbon Lab-appens filer er urørte (SHA-256-checksummer dokumenteret i registret).
runs.lesson: First lock one canonical reference pose/material A/B target; then build the bounded geometry-core spike with canonical spec types, golden C/S fixtures.
runs.lessonDa: Lås først ét kanonisk reference-mål for pose/materiale-A/B; byg derefter den afgrænsede geometri-kerne-spike med kanoniske spec-typer, golden-fixtures og preset-konverteringstests, før controls eller rendering ændres.

runs.name: Opgradér Frankly OS til målmodellen: formi
runs.summary: Masterprompt udført af 22-agent workflow: gap-analyse (7 MANGLER/5 DELVIST), 3 byggespor med adversarial kontrol, pilot green (QA 2 runder), metode-roundtrip v0-3 til v0-4, 2 bugs fundet og rettet undervejs
runs.summaryDa: Masterprompt udført af 22-agent workflow: gap-analyse (7 MANGLER/5 DELVIST), 3 byggespor med adversarial kontrol, pilot green (QA 2 runder), metode-roundtrip v0-3 til v0-4, 2 bugs fundet og rettet undervejs
gatesDa: Ingen gated handlinger; alt safe-local; nye specialister arver alle gates
runs.lesson: Nye chats booter og er automatisk formidler; agent-smeden og metode-fladen er live.
runs.lessonDa: Nye chats booter og er automatisk formidler; agent-smeden og metode-fladen er live.

runs.name: Pilot: diagram-styleguide gennem det nye f
runs.summary: Formidler-packet, agent-smeden (R4.1), parallelle specialister, QA-gate med ret-runde, metode-roundtrip via cockpit
runs.summaryDa: Formidler-packet, agent-smeden (R4.1), parallelle specialister, QA-gate med ret-runde, metode-roundtrip via cockpit
runs.lesson: Formidler-flowet er valideret — brug det som standard for nye chats.
runs.lessonDa: Formidler-flowet er valideret — brug det som standard for nye chats.

runs.name: Måldiagram (v2 + drawio) og verificeret ma
runs.summary: Jonas' systemskitse oversat til godkendt målmodel; flowchart v2 + drawio bygget; masterprompt bygget af 15-agent workflow (69 fakta, 3 udkast, dommerpanel, 3 verifikatorer), 1 high-issue auto-rettet + 2 manuelle rettelser; gemt i generated-prompts og committet
runs.summaryDa: Jonas' systemskitse oversat til godkendt målmodel; flowchart v2 + drawio bygget; masterprompt bygget af 15-agent workflow (69 fakta, 3 udkast, dommerpanel, 3 verifikatorer), 1 high-issue auto-rettet + 2 manuelle rettelser; gemt i generated-prompts og committet
gatesDa: Ingen gated handlinger udført; Drive-kopi af drawio afventer Jonas
runs.lesson: Giv masterprompten til den chat der kender systemet bedst: masterprompt-formidler-opgradering-v01.
runs.lessonDa: Giv masterprompten til den chat der kender systemet bedst: masterprompt-formidler-opgradering-v01.

runs.name: Prototype a local Frankly OS v2 glass-box
runs.summary: Restored the standalone glaskasse prism material: chromatic edge light, spectral bands and RGB-split static refraction now make the background visibly bend through the glass. Frankly OS v2 remains de-integrated and clean.
runs.summaryDa: Genskabte det selvstændige glaskasse-prisme-materiale: kromatisk kantlys, spektralbånd og RGB-splittet statisk refraktion får nu baggrunden til synligt at bøje gennem glasset. Frankly OS v2 forbliver de-integreret og ren.
runs.lesson: Review the standalone prism/refraction direction in outputs/prototypes/glass-box-system; only promote into any Frankly OS surface after Jonas explicit.
runs.lessonDa: Gennemgå den selvstændige prisme/refraktions-retning i outputs/prototypes/glass-box-system; promover først ind i en Frankly OS-flade når Jonas eksplicit har godkendt designet.

runs.name: Get the whole workspace to a clean green b
runs.summary: run-local-site-qa localRefs now exempts refs that carry an onerror graceful-degradation handler (the images-later pattern): the post ships before its art and hides the slot until the file lands, so a missing optional image no longer fails QA. Teeth preserved: a missing image WITHOUT onerror still fails (negative-tested). This was the only red in the workspace (journal posts 07-10, 16 optional images). Whole baseline now green.
runs.summaryDa: run-local-site-qa localRefs undtager nu -referencer med onerror-fallback (images-later-mønstret): posten udgives før sit billedmateriale og skjuler pladsen indtil filen lander, så et manglende valgfrit billede ikke længere fælder QA. Tænderne er bevaret: et manglende billede UDEN onerror fejler stadig (negativ-testet). Dette var den eneste røde i hele workspacet (journal-posts 07-10, 16 valgfrie billeder). Hele baseline er nu grøn.
runs.lesson: Jonas-only items remain: enable launchd, cockpit URL, Lab deploy, real journal images when ready.
runs.lessonDa: Tilbage er kun Jonas-punkter: slå launchd til, cockpit-URL, Lab-deploy og rigtige journal-billeder når de er klar.

runs.name: Reconcile the active-batch drift by regist
runs.summary: Registered MCQ-011 (Run Registry + Local Eval Harness) as a batch in mission-control-queue.json (evidenceType=report) and set activeBatch=MCQ-011 across queue/currentBatchId, machine-handoff-state, machine-core-priority, prompt-agent, system-live-data (2), the site feed, the mission-control-queue.html inline QUEUE and the handoff packet header. Evolved validate-machine-state.check_browser_evidence so non-UI batches prove themselves with their run report + artifacts (which must exist) instead of screenshots, and added check_v2_window_alignment so the v2 window can't drift from the core again. Machine-state PASS (0/0), evals 28/28. The active-batch drift is resolved; the daily packet + pulse now target MCQ-011.
runs.summaryDa: Registrerede MCQ-011 (Kørselsregister + lokal eval-harness) som batch i mission-control-queue.json (evidenceType=report) og satte activeBatch=MCQ-011 på tværs af kø/currentBatchId, machine-handoff-state, machine-core-priority, prompt-agent, system-live-data (2), site-feedet, mission-control-queue.html's inline QUEUE og handoff-pakkens header. Udviklede validate-machine-state.check_browser_evidence så ikke-UI-batches beviser sig med run-rapport + artefakter (som skal findes) i stedet for screenshots, og tilføjede check_v2_window_alignment så v2-vinduet ikke kan drive fra kernen igen. Machine-state PASS (0/0), evals 28/28. Aktiv-batch-driften er løst; den daglige pakke + puls sigter nu på MCQ-011.
runs.lesson: Jonas: add the 4 missing blog-07 images so site-QA localRefs goes green; then enable the launchd scheduler.
runs.lessonDa: Jonas: tilføj de 4 manglende blog-07-billeder så site-QA localRefs bliver grøn; slå derefter launchd-scheduleren til.

runs.name: Formally retire the three static OS dashbo
runs.summary: Retirement-in-place: deprecation banner (data-retired-banner) added to the 3 pages linking to the v2 window; dated register static-dashboard-retirement-2026-07-07.json; ledger + handoff updated. Kept files in place because 3 Control Cockpit evals read control-cockpit.html from disk and feed-sync/registry/nav still reference all three — hard removal scoped as a follow-up. Also fixed 2 dead blog/index.html nav links (fallout from the parallel blog->journal migration) by repointing to journal/frankly-blog-index.html, which had turned site-QA red independently of this work.
runs.summaryDa: Pensionering-på-stedet: deprecation-banner (data-retired-banner) tilføjet de 3 sider med link til v2-vinduet; dateret register static-dashboard-retirement-2026-07-07.json; ledger + handoff opdateret. Filerne blev liggende, fordi 3 Control Cockpit-evals læser control-cockpit.html fra disken, og feed-sync/registry/nav stadig refererer alle tre — hård fjernelse er scopet som opfølgning. Rettede også 2 døde blog/index.html-nav-links (efterdønning af den parallelle blog→journal-migrering) ved at pege dem til journal/frankly-blog-index.html, som uafhængigt havde gjort site-QA rød.
runs.lesson: Optional hard removal: retire cockpit evals + feed/registry refs + nav cross-links, then move files to outputs/legacy/.
runs.lessonDa: Valgfri hård fjernelse: pensionér cockpit-evals + feed/registry-referencer + nav-krydslinks, og flyt derefter filerne til outputs/legacy/.

runs.name: Make the system feel alive: heartbeat puls
runs.summary: self-check.py now computes active-batch consistency (catches MCQ-010 vs MCQ-011 drift) and writes it to the heartbeat feed; daily-run.py now also syncs site data feeds so the local data layer stays live. v2 Maskine renders a live pulse (green healthy / amber failing / red no-pulse when the job stops firing), a consistency warning, and polls every 60s so an always-open window stays current. Scheduler (launchd) is still Jonas's manual enable.
runs.summaryDa: self-check.py beregner nu aktiv-batch-konsistens (fanger MCQ-010 vs MCQ-011-drift) og skriver den til heartbeat-feedet; daily-run.py synkroniserer nu også site-datafeeds, så det lokale datalag holder sig levende. v2 Maskine viser en levende puls (grøn sund / gul fejlende / rød ingen-puls når jobbet holder op med at køre), en konsistens-advarsel og poller hvert 60. sekund, så et altid-åbent vindue forbliver aktuelt. Scheduleren (launchd) er stadig Jonas' manuelle tilvalg.
runs.lesson: Jonas enables the launchd job so the pulse beats daily; then reconcile the MCQ-010/011 drift (task_d5d14500).
runs.lessonDa: Jonas slår launchd-jobbet til så pulsen slår dagligt; forlig derefter MCQ-010/011-driften (task_d5d14500).

runs.name: Surface the daily automation output (self-
runs.summary: self-check.py + daily-run.py now emit outputs/prototypes/frankly-os-site-v2/automation-status.json (health, checks, freshness, packet); Maskine renders it via paintAutomation. QA scanner does not scan v2, baseline stays green. Surfaced pre-existing drift: daily packet reads MCQ-010 from a 6-day-stale mission-control-queue.json while true active batch is MCQ-011.
runs.summaryDa: self-check.py + daily-run.py udsender nu outputs/prototypes/frankly-os-site-v2/automation-status.json (health, checks, freshness, packet); Maskine viser det via paintAutomation. QA-scanneren scanner ikke v2, baseline forbliver grøn. Synliggjorde eksisterende drift: den daglige pakke læser MCQ-010 fra en 6 dage gammel mission-control-queue.json, mens den reelle aktive batch er MCQ-011.
runs.lesson: Fix mission-control-queue.
runs.lessonDa: Ret mission-control-queue.json's staleness så den genererede pakke sigter på MCQ-011, ikke MCQ-010.

runs.name: Publish safe Frankly Lab online split afte
runs.summary: Updated the online os.franklydesign.dk bundle to the safe Frankly Test Lab boundary: gated landing plus BMW HTML test only; internal OS surfaces and product/legal drafts remain local. GitHub Actions deploy 28821748112 succeeded, then remote deploy workflow was returned to manual-only.
runs.summaryDa: Opdaterede online-bundtet for os.franklydesign.dk til den sikre Frankly Test Lab-grænse: gated landing plus BMW HTML-test alene; interne OS-flader og produkt/legal-udkast forbliver lokale. GitHub Actions-deploy 28821748112 lykkedes, hvorefter remote deploy-workflow blev sat tilbage til manuel-kun.
runs.lesson: Resolve git divergence between local frankly-os-site main and remote API commits before the next normal push; keep product/legal drafts out of public .
runs.lessonDa: Løs git-divergensen mellem lokal frankly-os-site main og remote API-commits før næste normale push; hold produkt/legal-udkast ude af det offentlige bundle indtil Jonas eksplicit genåbner det scope.

runs.name: Upgrade the local Frankly OS Slack lab so
runs.summary: Slack Chat Mesh v0.1 adds a first-class chat route, expanded specialist mesh, higher local run capacity and portable room contract while keeping Slack lab work local-only and approval-gated.
runs.summaryDa: Slack Chat Mesh v0.1 tilføjer en førsteklasses chat-rute, udvidet specialist-mesh, højere lokal kørselskapacitet og en flytbar rum-kontrakt, mens Slack-lab-arbejdet forbliver kun-lokalt og godkendelses-gated.
runs.lesson: Use chat: for local reusable multi-agent Slack lab rooms; keep live Slack/company-visible automation, Drive connector writes, paid APIs, plugin instal.
runs.lessonDa: Brug chat: til lokale genbrugelige multi-agent Slack-lab-rum; hold live Slack/firma-synlig automatik, Drive-connector-skrivninger, betalte API'er, plugin-installs, automatisk tråd-oprettelse og claims/produkt/legal/source-record-arbejde gated.

runs.name: Claude Run-to-Packet Launcher v0.1
runs.summary: Claude Run-to-Packet Launcher v0.1 upgrades Studio with a registry-fed source-run selector that pre-fills the Claude task packet with task shape, target surface, objective, source run and source lesson while preserving local gates.
runs.summaryDa: Claude Run-to-Packet Launcher v0.1 opgraderer Studio med en registry-født kilde-kørselsvælger, der på forhånd udfylder Claude-task-pakken med opgaveform, målflade, mål, kilde-kørsel og kilde-læring, mens de lokale gates bevares.
artifacts: claude run to packet launcher v0 1
claude run to packet launcher v0 1
runs.lesson: A packet gets easier to trust when it starts from recorded machine memory instead of a blank prompt.
runs.lessonDa: En pakke bliver lettere at stole på, når den starter fra registreret maskin-hukommelse i stedet for en blank prompt.

runs.name: Claude Task Packet Builder v0.1
runs.summary: Claude Task Packet Builder v0.1 upgrades Studio with a local read-only task packet builder for future Claude Code work, including task shape, target surface, objective, read-first files, allowed work, expected outputs, do-not-touch boundaries, validation commands, browser QA target, run trace and strict stop rule.
runs.summaryDa: Claude Task Packet Builder v0.1 opgraderer Studio med en lokal read-only task-pakke-bygger til fremtidigt Claude Code-arbejde, inkl. opgaveform, målflade, mål, læs-først-filer, tilladt arbejde, forventede outputs, må-ikke-røres-grænser, valideringskommandoer, browser-QA-mål, kørselsspor og en stram stop-regel.
runs.lesson: A task packet becomes useful when the stop rules are copyable before the agent starts editing.
runs.lessonDa: En task-pakke bliver nyttig, når stop-reglerne kan kopieres, før agenten begynder at redigere.

runs.name: Studio v0.1
runs.summary: Studio v0.1 adds a local noindex software-like Frankly OS workbench with command palette, mission/gate view, registry-fed run memory, validation console, Drive queue and Claude Code Execution Lane packet preview.
runs.summaryDa: Studio v0.1 tilføjer en lokal noindex software-agtig Frankly OS-arbejdsbænk med kommandopalet, missions-/gate-visning, registry-født kørselshukommelse, valideringskonsol, Drive-kø og pakke-preview for Claude Code-eksekveringssporet.
runs.lesson: The OS becomes easier to use when it feels like software, but still stays backed by files, gates and validation.
runs.lessonDa: OS'et bliver lettere at bruge, når det føles som software, men stadig er bakket op af filer, gates og validering.

runs.name: Future Mode v0.1
runs.summary: Future Mode v0.1 previews likely next machine moves with lane, allowed work, blocked gates, validation and stop rule while keeping automation, connector writes and claims/product/legal locked.
runs.summaryDa: Future Mode v0.1 forhåndsviser sandsynlige næste maskintræk med spor, tilladt arbejde, blokerede gates, validering og stop-regel, mens automatisering, connector-skrivninger og claims/produkt/legal holdes låst.
runs.lesson: A future preview is useful only when it makes the stop rules as visible as the promise.
runs.lessonDa: Et fremtids-preview er kun nyttigt, når det gør stop-reglerne lige så synlige som løftet.

runs.name: Mission Theatre v0.1
runs.summary: Mission Theatre v0.1 turns recent local machine runs into brief, gate, build, validate and learn cues inside Observatory while using the same registry-fed run memory as Flight Recorder.
runs.summaryDa: Mission Theatre v0.1 gør nylige lokale maskinkørsler til brief-, gate-, byg-, validér- og lær-cues i Observatory, med samme registry-fødte kørselshukommelse som Flight Recorder.
runs.lesson: Run memory becomes easier to use when the system can replay why it stopped.
runs.lessonDa: Kørsels-hukommelse bliver lettere at bruge, når systemet kan afspille, hvorfor det stoppede.

runs.name: Launch Packet v0.1
runs.summary: Launch Packet v0.1 turns Mission Simulator output into a local agent-ready contract with mission, route, lane, do-not-touch boundaries, validation and stop rule while keeping connector writes and claims/product/legal locked.
runs.summaryDa: Launch Packet v0.1 gør Missions-simulatorens output til en lokal agent-klar kontrakt med mission, rute, spor, må-ikke-røres-grænser, validering og stop-regel, mens connector-skrivninger og claims/produkt/legal holdes låst.
runs.lesson: A visual preflight becomes more useful when it produces an agent-ready stop rule.
runs.lessonDa: Et visuelt preflight bliver mere nyttigt, når det producerer en agent-klar stop-regel.

runs.name: Mission Simulator v0.1
runs.summary: Mission Simulator v0.1 previews future work inside Observatory as route, lane, allowed actions, blocked gates, validation path and output shape while keeping connector writes and claims/product/legal locked.
runs.summaryDa: Missions-simulator v0.1 forhåndsviser fremtidigt arbejde i Observatory som rute, spor, tilladte handlinger, blokerede gates, valideringssti og output-form, mens connector-skrivninger og claims/produkt/legal holdes låst.
runs.lesson: Future work gets easier when gates are previewed before tools move.
runs.lessonDa: Fremtidigt arbejde bliver lettere, når gates forhåndsvises, før værktøjerne rører sig.

runs.name: Drive-Ready Bundle v0.1
runs.summary: Drive-Ready Bundle Dry Run v0.1 verifies the six queued Drive continuity runs locally, generates a checksum-backed approval packet, updates continuity state, passes Observatory browser QA and writes a Monday 2026-07-06 decision brief without connector writes.
runs.summaryDa: Drive-klar bundle-generalprøve v0.1 verificerer de seks køede Drive-kontinuitetskørsler lokalt, genererer en checksum-bakket godkendelsespakke, opdaterer kontinuitetstilstanden, består Observatory browser-QA og skriver et beslutningsbrief til mandag 2026-07-06 uden connector-skrivninger.
runs.lesson: Decision packets should be generated before connector writes are requested.
runs.lessonDa: Beslutningspakker bør genereres, før der bedes om connector-skrivninger.

runs.name: Registry Feed v0.1
runs.summary: Registry Feed v0.1 makes Flight Recorder read frankly-os-site/data/flight-recorder.json generated from run-registry.json, with direct-file fallback preserved and all connector, deploy and claims gates closed.
runs.summaryDa: Registry Feed v0.1 får Flight Recorder til at læse frankly-os-site/data/flight-recorder.json genereret fra run-registry.json, med direkte-fil-fallback bevaret og alle connector-, deploy- og claims-gates lukkede.
runs.lesson: Use the registry-fed Flight Recorder as the default recent-run memory surface; pause unless Jonas approves Drive sync or asks for another concrete non.
runs.lessonDa: Brug den registry-fødte Flight Recorder som standardflade for nylig kørsels-hukommelse; hold pause medmindre Jonas godkender Drive-sync eller beder om en anden konkret ikke-claims-leverance.

runs.name: Flight Recorder v0.1
runs.summary: Flight Recorder v0.1 makes recent Frankly OS machine runs inspectable inside Observatory with replay controls, route/status panels, artifacts, gates, validation and reusable lessons while preserving all connector, deploy and claims gates.
runs.summaryDa: Flight Recorder v0.1 gør nylige Frankly OS-maskinkørsler inspicerbare i Observatory med replay-kontroller, rute/status-paneler, artefakter, gates, validering og genbrugelige læringer, mens alle connector-, deploy- og claims-gates bevares.
runs.lesson: A replay surface should read the registry so memory does not drift.
runs.lessonDa: En replay-flade bør læse registret, så hukommelsen ikke driver.

runs.name: Observatory v0.1
runs.summary: Observatory v0.1 adds a local noindex machine constellation surface with canvas signal map, route forecast, Drive pending dock, run replay, gate radar and route-health lanes without touching claims/product/legal or connector writes.
runs.summaryDa: Observatory v0.1 tilføjer en lokal noindex maskin-konstellationsflade med canvas-signalkort, rute-forecast, Drive-ventedok, kørsels-replay, gate-radar og rute-sundhedsspor uden at røre claims/produkt/legal eller connector-skrivninger.
runs.lesson: A vivid surface works best when grounded in real machine state.
runs.lessonDa: En levende flade virker bedst, når den er forankret i reel maskintilstand.

runs.name: Drive Pending Queue
runs.summary: Drive Pending Queue rep 001 lists three completed-local Frankly OS runs awaiting explicit Drive connector approval and prepares target folders, artifact lists, shared snapshots, exclusions and validation rules without performing any connector writes.
runs.summaryDa: Drive-ventekø rep 001 lister tre færdig-lokale Frankly OS-kørsler, der afventer eksplicit Drive-connector-godkendelse, og forbereder målmapper, artefaktlister, delte snapshots, ekskluderinger og valideringsregler uden at udføre connector-skrivninger.
runs.lesson: Connector-gated continuity should be a visible queue, not a memory burden.
runs.lessonDa: Connector-gated kontinuitet bør være en synlig kø, ikke en hukommelsesbyrde.

runs.name: Route QA Two-Lane
runs.summary: Route QA Two-Lane Reporting rep 003 updated run-route-qa.py to preserve legacy Route QA fields while adding structural completeness and promotion readiness lanes; rep 003 shows 20 structurally complete routes, 12 ready-active, 3 gated-ready and 5 needing real pilots.
runs.summaryDa: Rute-QA to-spors-rapportering rep 003 opdaterede run-route-qa.py til at bevare de gamle Rute-QA-felter og tilføje spor for strukturel komplethed og promoverings-parathed; rep 003 viser 20 strukturelt komplette ruter, 12 klar-aktive, 3 gated-klar og 5 der mangler reelle piloter.
gates: no route promotion without real pi
runs.lesson: Use Route QA rep 003 as the route-health baseline; do not promote test-next or gated routes without a real pilot or explicit approval.
runs.lessonDa: Brug Rute-QA rep 003 som baseline for rute-sundhed; promover ikke test-next- eller gatede ruter uden en reel pilot eller eksplicit godkendelse.

runs.name: Capability Radar
runs.summary: Capability Radar Pilot rep 001 used Control Cockpit, the Tool/Connector Guard Matrix and Route QA rep 002 to produce a local build/test/park/reject decision: pause unless Drive-sync housekeeping is explicitly approved or Jonas asks for a concrete non-claim deliverable.
runs.summaryDa: Evne-radar-pilot rep 001 brugte Control Cockpit, værktøjs-/connector-vagtmatricen og Rute-QA rep 002 til at producere en lokal byg/test/parkér/afvis-beslutning: hold pause medmindre Drive-sync-oprydning eksplicit godkendes, eller Jonas beder om en konkret ikke-claims-leverance.
runs.lesson: Pause after validation; if continuing, explicitly approve Drive-sync housekeeping for pending local runs or provide a concrete non-claim deliverable.
runs.lessonDa: Hold pause efter validering; hvis der fortsættes, godkend eksplicit Drive-sync-oprydning for ventende lokale kørsler eller giv en konkret ikke-claims-leverance.

runs.name: Route Door Hardening
runs.summary: Route Quality Door Hardening rep 002 added explicit quality doors to seven gated/test-next route docs, produced a fresh route QA artifact with zero missing structural checks, and kept claims/product/legal scope locked.
runs.summaryDa: Rute-kvalitetsdørs-hærdning rep 002 tilføjede eksplicitte kvalitetsdøre til syv gatede/test-next-rutedokumenter, producerede et frisk Rute-QA-artefakt med nul manglende strukturelle tjek og holdt claims/produkt/legal-scope låst.
runs.lesson: Use the structurally complete route layer for one small non-claim pilot, starting from Control Cockpit and the Tool/Connector Guard Matrix; Drive-sync.
runs.lessonDa: Brug det strukturelt komplette rutelag til én lille ikke-claims-pilot, startende fra Control Cockpit og værktøjs-/connector-vagtmatricen; Drive-sync rep 002 kun efter eksplicit connector-godkendelse.

runs.name: Control Cockpit v0.1
runs.summary: Control Cockpit v0.1 gives Jonas and future coding agents one internal launch surface for current state, active gates, Claude Code execution lane, run history, Drive continuity and next actions; artifacts are Drive-synced and claims scope remains locked.
runs.summaryDa: Control Cockpit v0.1 giver Jonas og fremtidige kodende agenter én intern startflade for aktuel tilstand, aktive gates, Claude Code-eksekveringssporet, kørselshistorik, Drive-kontinuitet og næste handlinger; artefakter er Drive-synkroniserede og claims-scope forbliver låst.
runs.lesson: Use Control Cockpit v0.
runs.lessonDa: Brug Control Cockpit v0.1 som startpunkt for den næste ikke-claims maskin-aktivering, og anvend derefter værktøjs-/connector-vagtmatricen, før agent/loop/ruter bruges igen.

runs.name: Tool Guard Matrix
runs.summary: Tool/Connector Guard Matrix classifies filesystem, git, browser, Drive, Slack, OpenAI API, deploy, plugin install, thread creation and claims/product/legal actions before more automation.
runs.summaryDa: Værktøjs-/connector-vagtmatricen klassificerer filsystem-, git-, browser-, Drive-, Slack-, OpenAI-API-, deploy-, plugin-installations-, tråd-oprettelses- og claims/produkt/legal-handlinger før mere automatisering.
runs.lesson: Use the matrix as preflight on the next non-claim agent/loop/routes task, then record validation and Drive continuity.
runs.lessonDa: Brug matricen som preflight på den næste ikke-claims agent/loop/rute-opgave, og registrér derefter validering og Drive-kontinuitet.

runs.name: Repository Instructions
runs.summary: Repository Instructions rep 001 created root and site AGENTS.md files, a machine-readable artifact, a report, a Drive upload manifest and eval coverage without touching claims/product/legal scope.
runs.summaryDa: Repo-instruktioner rep 001 oprettede root- og site-AGENTS.md-filer, et maskinlæsbart artefakt, en rapport, et Drive-upload-manifest og eval-dækning uden at røre claims/produkt/legal-scope.
runs.lesson: Repository Instructions rep is Drive-synced; close root/site git commits, then define a tool/connector guard matrix before more automation.
runs.lessonDa: Repo-instruktions-reppen er Drive-synkroniseret; luk root/site git-commits, og definér derefter en værktøjs-/connector-vagtmatrix før mere automatisering.

runs.name: Presentation Machine
runs.summary: Presentation Machine rep 001 produced a 12-slide internal Frankly OS deck spine with approval gates and no claims/product/legal scope touch.
runs.summaryDa: Præsentationsmaskine rep 001 producerede en 12-slides intern Frankly OS deck-rygrad med godkendelses-gates og uden berøring af claims/produkt/legal-scope.
runs.lesson: Presentation Machine rep is Drive-synced; keep the deck spine internal-only until visual QA and Jonas approval, and close root/site git commits before.
runs.lessonDa: Presentation Machine-reppen er Drive-synkroniseret; hold deck-rygraden intern indtil visuel QA og Jonas' godkendelse, og luk root/site git-commits før mere autonomi.

runs.name: Route QA rep 001
runs.summary: Route QA rep 001 audited 20 route docs, hardened four active routes and left 0 high-risk active route findings.
runs.summaryDa: Rute-QA rep 001 auditerede 20 rutedokumenter, hærdede fire aktive ruter og efterlod 0 højrisiko-fund på aktive ruter.
runs.lesson: Run Presentation Machine as MCQ-011 route rep 2/3 and create a Frankly OS deck spine without touching claims/product/legal scope.
runs.lessonDa: Kør Presentation Machine som MCQ-011 rute-rep 2/3 og lav en Frankly OS deck-rygrad uden at røre claims/produkt/legal-scope.

runs.name: Run Registry v0.1
runs.summary: Install a local run registry, recorder script and eval coverage so future machine runs become traceable before more automation.
runs.summaryDa: Installerede et lokalt kørselsregister, et recorder-script og eval-dækning, så fremtidige maskinkørsler bliver sporbare før mere automatisering.
runs.lesson: The system can only learn from work it records.
runs.lessonDa: Systemet kan kun lære af arbejde, det registrerer.

runs.name: Claims Lock
runs.summary: Recorded Jonas's claims-work lock, redirected the active next move away from evidence/source work and added a local Frankly OS eval harness.
runs.summaryDa: Registrerede Jonas' claims-arbejdslås, omdirigerede det aktive næste træk væk fra evidens-/kildearbejde og tilføjede en lokal Frankly OS eval-harness.
runs.lesson: A good machine must remember what not to work on.
runs.lessonDa: En god maskine skal huske, hvad den ikke skal arbejde på.
